title: Thai Poppy Seed Fritters
description: Crispy fritters with a delicate Thai twist, made with poppy seeds and a hint of sweetness. Perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine poppy seeds and floral rice flour.
In a separate bowl, mix coconut milk, honey, and salt.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth.
Cover the dough with plastic wrap and let it rest for 30 minutes.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of dough into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters until they are golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
Serve with a side of sweet chili sauce for dipping.
